message:
Add bundle AddDirectory and verifyTarGz branch tests (59.2%→86.6%)

Tests cover AddDirectory (0%→94.4%), verifyTarGz (0%→96.7%),
Verify (54.5%→100%), verifyManifestFiles (56.5%→95.7%), plus
tar.gz error paths: corrupt gzip, corrupt tar, missing manifest,
bad JSON, invalid schema, missing files, checksum mismatch,
size mismatch warning, and unknown format.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
